headline: Citizens Financial Group, Alkami (ALKT) Partner to Modernize Deposit Account Opening Process
summary: Alkami Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:ALKT) is one of the best tech stocks to buy for the next 5 years. On May 27, Alkami announced that Citizens Bank, an East Tennessee community bank and existing Alkami customer, is expanding its partnership with Alkami by selecting MANTL to modernize its deposit account opening process. This integration will provide […]

headline: Citizens Financial: The Strong Bullish Thesis Continues, As Margins And Resilience Improve
